examples: He tipped down in the direction of a herd of white-eared kob, streaming north by the thousands.
For an hour the kob course under the plane, almost like a river, flowing across the broken soil and around the trees.
Cordyceps kyushuensis Kob is a kind of rare medicinal fungi. Due to its unique medicinal value, it has become the research focus.
From the border with Ethiopia in the east come the white-eared kob, another breed of antelope.
